# Starsolution S.A.S.

> Starsolution is an enterprise cybersecurity company based in Bogota, Colombia, with offices in Caracas, Venezuela and Miami, Florida. Founded in 2013, we protect 3,000+ businesses across Latin America and the United States through three pillars of digital resilience: Star Protection, Star Inspection, and Star Compliance.

## Company Overview

- Full name: Starsolution S.A.S.
- Industry: Enterprise Cybersecurity
- Founded: 2013
- Headquarters: Calle 52 A # 22-16, Bogota, Colombia
- Employees: 15+
- Businesses protected: 3,000+
- Markets: Colombia, Venezuela, United States (Miami, FL)
- Languages: Spanish (primary), English (Miami office)
- Certifications: ISO 27001 and ISO 9001 compliant
- Rating: 4.9/5 from 127 reviews

## Services

### Star Protection - Endpoint & Email Security
- [Bitdefender GravityZone EDR/XDR](https://starsolution.com.co/bitdefender): AI-powered enterprise endpoint protection with multi-layered defense
- [Kaspersky Endpoint Security](https://starsolution.com.co/kaspersky): Endpoint and server protection for businesses
- [Hornetsecurity 365](https://starsolution.com.co/hornet-security): Email security and backup for Microsoft 365
- [Proofpoint](https://starsolution.com.co/proofpoint): Advanced email security, anti-phishing, and threat intelligence

### Star Inspection - Visibility & Threat Detection
- [Enthec](https://starsolution.com.co/enthec): Attack surface monitoring, dark web surveillance, and leaked credential detection
- [Vicarius vRx](https://starsolution.com.co/vicarius): AI-powered vulnerability management and prioritization
- [Stellar Cyber Open XDR](https://starsolution.com.co/stellar-cyber): Automated SOC platform with AI-driven threat detection
- [Ethical Hacking & Penetration Testing](https://starsolution.com.co/hacking-etico): CEH/OSCP certified penetration testing team
- [rThreat - Red Team & BAS](https://starsolution.com.co/rthreat-bogota-colombia): Breach and Attack Simulation platform

### Star Compliance - Governance & Standards
- [ISO 27001 Consulting](https://starsolution.com.co/iso27001): Gap analysis, SGSI implementation, audit preparation, certification support
- [SealPath](https://starsolution.com.co/sealpath): Document-centric data protection and digital rights management
- [Netwrix](https://starsolution.com.co/netwrix): Identity audit, governance, and change monitoring
- [Black Duck](https://starsolution.com.co/black-duck): Application security testing (SAST, DAST, SCA)
- [DLP - Data Loss Prevention](https://starsolution.com.co/dlp-prevencion-perdida-datos): Endpoint Protector for data loss prevention

### Infrastructure & Productivity
- [TeamViewer](https://starsolution.com.co/teamviewer): Enterprise remote access and support
- [AnyDesk](https://starsolution.com.co/anydesk): Ultra-fast remote desktop
- [SOTI MobiControl](https://starsolution.com.co/soti-mdm): Enterprise mobile device management (MDM/EMM)
- [Cableado Estructurado](https://starsolution.com.co/cableado-estructurado): Structured cabling and network installation
- [Equipos de Computo](https://starsolution.com.co/equipos-computo): Enterprise hardware and workstations
- [Brother](https://starsolution.com.co/brother): Authorized distributor of printers and multifunction devices
